action: Embed the AI into the existing daily workflow instead of a separate tool
rationale: Adoption follows the path of least resistance; meeting users where they already work removes friction

action: Run a 2-week guided onboarding with in-context nudges and a usage dashboard
rationale: Habit formation needs reinforcement; visible nudges and metrics sustain engagement past the novelty period

action: Define 2-3 baseline KPIs before relaunch (e.g. handle time, deflection rate, cost per ticket)
rationale: You cannot show ROI you never measured; a baseline makes value provable to leadership

action: Instrument the pilot to capture before/after metrics automatically
rationale: Automatic measurement produces a defensible business case at budget-renewal time

action: Profile and clean the top data sources feeding the model before retraining
rationale: Output quality is bounded by input quality; cleaning upstream lifts every downstream result

action: Add a retrieval layer over a curated, governed knowledge base instead of raw data
rationale: Grounding on a vetted source reduces the blast radius of dirty data

action: Bring security, legal, and compliance into the next sprint as co-owners
rationale: Early co-ownership turns blockers into requirements and unblocks the path to production

action: Add input/output guardrails and PII redaction with an audit log
rationale: Concrete controls address the specific risks reviewers cite and create an audit trail

action: Cut scope to one bounded use case with a written definition of done
rationale: A narrow, finishable target converges; an unbounded one never ships

action: Freeze requirements for the next iteration and queue everything else
rationale: A requirements freeze stops the moving target that prevents completion

action: Right-size the model and add caching for repeated queries
rationale: Most production cost and latency comes from over-large models and redundant calls

action: Set a per-request token budget and stream responses
rationale: Budgets cap spend and streaming improves perceived latency without infra changes

action: Ground answers in retrieved sources and cite them in the UI
rationale: Citations let users verify, which rebuilds trust and reduces unchecked errors

action: Add confidence thresholds that defer low-confidence answers to a human
rationale: Routing uncertain cases to a human prevents the visible failures that erode trust

action: Recruit an executive sponsor and a frontline champion per team
rationale: Visible sponsorship and peer advocacy overcome cultural resistance faster than mandates

action: Communicate explicitly how roles change and reskill, not replace
rationale: Naming the fear directly and showing the upside reduces quiet sabotage

action: Scope the last-mile integration (CRM/ERP/auth) as a first-class workstream
rationale: Production value is unlocked only when the tool is wired into systems of record

action: Stand up a thin production-grade API and auth layer early
rationale: An early integration spine de-risks the prototype-to-production jump

action: Re-select the use case by value x feasibility, anchored to a real user pain
rationale: A high-value, feasible use case is the single biggest predictor of pilot success

action: Validate demand with 5 target users before further build
rationale: Direct user validation prevents investing further in a low-need use case
